title: BEHAVIORAL THERAPY AND COUNSELING - 211info
text: OYEN EMOTIONAL WELLNESS BEHAVIORAL THERAPY AND COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health services in person and via telehealth for individuals, couples, and families including therapy, mental health evaluations for immigration purposes, substance abuse and grief support, and suicide support. Also offers educational community presentations. 255 N Arney Road Suite 220 Woodburn, OR 97071 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-7pm Email (503) 395-4224 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 395-4224 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call to schedule an appointment. Call or visit website for additional information. FEES: Accepts Pacific Source, OHP, Care Oregon, Kaiser Permanente, Moda, Providence, Samaritan, Trillium, and Blue Cross. Sliding scale options available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Bereavement and Grief Counseling Conjoint Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Suicide Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OYEN EMOTIONAL WELLNESS
